feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: Statistical inference for saved time based on disease progression curves in Alzheimer's disease research.
drug.zh: 提出基于疾病进展曲线上方区域计算节省时间的统计推断方法，解决了闭合形式方差推导难题。

drug.title: Comparative risk of amyloid-related imaging abnormalities with anti-amyloid-β monoclonal antibodies: A systematic review and penalized likelihood network meta-analysis of randomized trials.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单抗治疗阿尔茨海默病时，ARIA-E风险排序为lecanemab > donanemab > aducanumab，APOE4携带者风险更高。

drug.title: Suboptimal adherence to brain health recommendations in patients pursuing anti-amyloid antibody therapy for Alzheimer's disease: Report from the Brain Health Vital Signs project.
drug.journal: The journal of prevention of Alzheimer's
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白治疗的早期阿尔茨海默病患者对脑健康建议的依从性普遍不足。

drug.title: UPLC-ESI-qTOF-MS metabolomic characterization and in vivo neuroprotective activity of Diplotaxis harra ethanolic extract through antioxidant, anti-cholinesterase, and anti-amyloid mechanisms.
drug.zh: Diplotaxis harra乙醇提取物通过抗氧化、抗胆碱酯酶和抗淀粉样蛋白机制，在铝诱导的阿尔茨海默病大鼠模型中显著改善空间记忆并恢复生化指标。

drug.title: Efficacy, safety and policy implications of anti-amyloid monoclonal antibodies for Alzheimer's disease: protocol for a living systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单克隆抗体对阿尔茨海默病疗效与安全性尚需持续更新的系统评价来明确。

drug.title: Optimal control for anti-abeta treatment in Alzheimer's disease using a reaction-diffusion model.
drug.journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface
drug.zh: 基于反应扩散模型的最优控制策略可实现抗Aβ治疗个体化给药，平衡疗效与ARIA风险。

drug.title: Microglial checkpoint collapse in Alzheimer's disease: a tri-axial framework for biomarker-informed neuroimmune therapy.
drug.zh: 小胶质细胞检查点崩溃是AD核心机制，提出脂质-溶酶体-神经元三轴框架指导神经免疫治疗。

drug.title: Longitudinal biomarkers in dementia with Lewy bodies: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 路易体痴呆纵向生物标志物荟萃分析揭示MRI脑萎缩与临床进展显著相关。

mech.title: A Combination of Artemisinin, N-acetylcysteine, Resveratrol, and Hesperidin Ameliorates Hippocampal Damage and Pathological Features in an Experimental Model of Alzheimer's Disease.
mech.zh: 青蒿素等四药联用改善AD模型大鼠海马损伤与病理特征，降低p-tau和Aβ水平。

mech.title: Hunting for an Antigen: Humoral Immunity in Alzheimer's Disease.
mech.zh: 阿尔茨海默病中血脑屏障破坏引发体液免疫异常，提示自身免疫机制参与致病。

mech.title: Rethinking Anti-Inflammatory Therapy in Alzheimer's Disease: From Broad Suppression to Stage-State-Space Neuroimmune Reprogramming.
mech.zh: 阿尔茨海默病的抗炎治疗应从广泛抑制转向基于疾病阶段、细胞状态和空间特征的神经免疫重编程。

mech.title: Human Microglial Molecular Alterations in Aging and Alzheimer's Disease.
mech.zh: 人类小胶质细胞在衰老与阿尔茨海默病中呈现特异性基因与形态改变，揭示疾病轨迹分岔机制。

mech.title: Lymphoid-like Suppressive Microglia in Alzheimer's Disease: A New Neuroimmune Regulatory Axis?
mech.zh: 阿尔茨海默病中一类类淋巴抑制性小胶质细胞可能构成新的神经免疫调控轴。

mech.title: Ameliorative Effects of a Naphthoquinone Derivative With β-Amyloid Aggregation Inhibitory Activity on Cognitive Impairment and Metabolite Analysis of the Blood and Brains of Mice.
mech.zh: 萘醌衍生物TPN强效抑制β-淀粉样蛋白聚集并改善认知障碍，其活性优于姜黄素。

mech.title: Proteomics of post mortem brains in early- and late-onset Alzheimer's disease: Unraveling differential Aβ effects and potential AD biomarkers.
mech.zh: 早发与晚发阿尔茨海默病脑蛋白质组差异揭示Aβ效应不同及新型p-tau生物标志物。

mech.title: Repurposing apremilast for alzheimer's disease: multitarget modulation of cAMP‑PI3K/Akt-GSK‑3β and NF‑κB signaling.
mech.zh: 阿普斯特通过多靶点调控cAMP-PI3K/Akt-GSK-3β和NF-κB信号通路，在阿尔茨海默病模型中发挥治疗潜力。

dx.title: Plasma Phosphorylated Tau 217 in Participants at Risk for Chronic Traumatic Encephalopathy.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217在慢性创伤性脑病风险人群中主要反映β-淀粉样蛋白病理，而非CTE特异性tau蛋白病变。

dx.title: A probabilistic framework for clinicopathological Alzheimer's disease using tau-PET.
dx.zh: 基于tau-PET构建概率框架，量化其预测临床病理阿尔茨海默病的阳性与阴性价值。

dx.title: Analytical and clinical validation of a novel proximity extension assay-based plasma biomarker panel in a cohort of prevalent neurodegenerative dementias.
dx.zh: 基于PEA技术的Olink 48-plex血浆蛋白组在多种痴呆鉴别中显示出良好的分析性能与临床诊断潜力。

dx.title: Relative importance of blood-based biomarkers for Alzheimer's disease-specific neurodegeneration and cognitive decline.
dx.journal: The journal of prevention of Alzheimer's
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217在阿尔茨海默病特异性神经退行和认知下降中重要性最高，优于NfL、GFAP和p-tau181。

dx.title: Application of plasma phosphorylated tau 217 in a memory clinic focusing on Chinese patients.
dx.zh: 血浆P-tau217在中国记忆门诊中可有效识别阿尔茨海默病，并确立本土化诊断阈值。

dx.title: Comparison of a multi-analyte algorithmic immunoassay blood test with immunoprecipitation mass spectrometry for the detection of amyloid pathology.
dx.zh: 多标志物免疫分析血液检测与质谱法在阿尔茨海默病淀粉样蛋白病理检测中具有高度一致性，AUC达0.94。

dx.title: Dissociable structural and molecular pathways of age-related change in sustained attention.
dx.journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biolog
dx.zh: 老年持续注意力下降由白质微结构退化和阿尔茨海默病理两条独立通路驱动。

dx.title: Relationships between longitudinal retinal amyloid imaging and amyloid PET in the A4 Trial.
dx.zh: A4试验中视网膜淀粉样蛋白纵向成像与PET结果无显著关联，不支持其作为替代标志物。

prev.title: Antidepressant use and dementia, cognitive measures, and neuroimaging outcomes: A population-based cohort study.
prev.zh: 抗抑郁药使用与痴呆风险降低无显著关联，提示既往阳性结果可能源于混杂偏倚。

prev.title: Plasma Proteomic Changes in GRN and C9orf72 Frontotemporal Dementia.
prev.zh: GRN和C9orf72基因突变所致额颞叶痴呆患者血浆中CNS相关蛋白谱呈现显著差异。

prev.title: Differences in the prevalence and patterns of dementia risk factors across 14 countries and regions: a harmonised cross-national analysis.
prev.zh: 14国痴呆风险因素流行率与模式差异显著，低中收入国家多项风险更高。

prev.title: Repeated mild spinal cord contusions exacerbate tauopathy development in PS19 mice.
prev.zh: 重复轻度脊髓挫伤加剧PS19小鼠tau蛋白病进展，提示脊髓损伤是阿尔茨海默病风险因素。

prev.title: Symptomatic conversion in a case of sporadic frontotemporal dementia: Longitudinal neuroimaging of the presymptomatic stage.
prev.journal: Cortex; a journal devoted to the study o
prev.zh: 首例病理证实的散发性额颞叶痴呆症前20年MRI显示皮质萎缩早于症状出现。

prev.title: Attitudes Towards Brain Health and Dementia Risk Reduction Among Minoritised Ethnic Communities in the United Kingdom: A Cross-Sectional Survey Analysis.
prev.zh: 英国少数族裔对痴呆风险认知不足且污名化更严重，亟需针对性干预。

prev.title: "I have lived proudly as myself": A Japanese woman's narrative of her life and aging.
prev.zh: 近三十年纵向叙事研究揭示日本老年女性在伴侣离世后如何通过重构生命故事应对社会变迁中的身份挑战。

prev.title: Trajectories and timing of accelerated decline in specific memory domains preceding Alzheimer's disease.
prev.zh: 阿尔茨海默病临床诊断前，特定记忆域衰退呈非线性加速，且不同记忆域受损时序各异。

intro.title: Osteoimmuno-brain axis: a bridge connecting osteoporosis and cognitive decline and its clinical significance in dementia and Alzheimer's disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是骨头变脆和脑子变糊涂可能有关联，搞清这个能帮老人提前预防或延缓痴呆。

intro.title: Advances in the Core Role and Mechanisms of Mitochondrial Dysfunction in Alzheimer's Disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑细胞里的能量工厂出问题会加速老年痴呆，看懂它能帮你理解为啥要保护大脑、延缓记性变差。

intro.title: Chemokines in Alzheimer's Disease: Early Defence, Late Damage and the Impact of Sex and Infection.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“趋化因子”的小信号在阿尔茨海默病早期保护、晚期捣乱的过程，还提到性别和感染会影响病情，帮你理解为啥有人更易得病。

intro.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
intro.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑细胞里的“垃圾清理系统”坏了会引发老年痴呆，并介绍了中药如何帮忙修复这个系统，对预防和改善病情有启发。

intro.title: Calibrating microglia states in Alzheimer's disease: decoding immune-metabolic networks and nano-targeted multicomponent therapies.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“小胶质细胞”的清洁工在老年痴呆中如何罢工或乱来，以及未来可能用纳米技术精准修复它们，帮普通人理解新疗法为啥不只看清除垃圾。

intro.title: Brain Endothelial Glycocalyx as a Blood-Facing Translational Interface in Alzheimer's Disease: Beyond "Leaky" Barriers Toward Repair-First Stratification.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑血管表面一层糖膜在老年痴呆中的作用，帮普通人理解病情新线索，不再只盯着“血管漏不漏”。

intro.title: HDAC3 in Alzheimer's Disease: established evidence, unresolved questions, and translational priorities.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫HDAC3的蛋白质和老年痴呆的关系，帮普通人看懂科学家在纠结什么、离新药还有多远。

intro.title: Advances in 3D cell culture models for alzheimer's disease drug discovery.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是用更逼真的立体脑细胞模型来测试老年痴呆药物，帮普通人更快找到有效疗法。
